components.description: Searchable, sortable application data table built from native table semantics.

properties.description: Caption rendered above the table when provided.
properties.name: caption

properties.description: Column definitions assigned as a property from JavaScript.
properties.name: columns

properties.description: Message shown when no visible rows remain after filtering or loading completes.
properties.name: emptyMessage

properties.description: Shows the loading state instead of row data.
properties.name: loading

properties.description: Maximum number of rows shown per page. Set to 0 to disable pagination.
properties.name: pageSize

properties.description: Row data assigned as a property from JavaScript.
properties.name: rows

properties.description: Enables the built-in search toolbar and filtering behavior.
properties.name: searchable

properties.description: Accessible label applied to the internal search control.
properties.name: searchLabel

properties.description: Placeholder text shown in the internal search control.
properties.name: searchPlaceholder

properties.description: Current search query used to filter visible rows.
properties.name: searchQuery

properties.description: Active sort direction for the current sort key.
properties.name: sortDirection

properties.description: Column key currently used for sorting.
properties.name: sortKey

events.description: Fired when the active sort column or direction changes.
events.name: sort-change

events.description: Fired when the current page changes through pagination.
events.name: page-change

events.description: Fired when the search query changes and the matching row count updates.
events.name: search-change

components.summary: Searchable, sortable data table for application records.
